data.body: [operator-attested] Readiness gate asserted for the emit_legacy_signature_mirror one-way-door removal (docs/migrations.md readiness gate). Basis: this fleet has NO pre-attestations rebar binary reading the tickets store. (1) This dev machine's global rebar/rebar-mcp auto-updates to origin/main HEAD hourly via a rollback-guarded LaunchAgent (see docs/local-env-main-tracking.local.md), so no stale/pre-attestations local build persists. (2) The GHA reconcile-bridge + canary and the AWS review-bot/auto-lander all run builds of current main (post-attestations; the additive-attestations rollout epic dark-acme-lumen landed well before this change). (3) No external/downstream clone shares this store — it is a single-project store on origin. Therefore dropping the persisted signature mirror is safe here; the in-memory re-derivation (process_signature) still serves any reader on a current binary. Timestamp: 2026-07-14 (this session).
